title: Kingdom Hearts 2 - 13th Struggle on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Wow, that was a toughie! This is the first song I made from a game that I've never played (I don't got a PS2 but I will get one once I get some motivation). Lots of instruments playing at the same time so I had to cut out snare drums and cymbal (sorry! At least the timpany is still in there). I think It's a little sloppy at points, but my video recorder decided not to act up and (for once) all that happened was the sync went off at the end (and the usual bad sound quality; sorry again). Once again I apologize for the gap in the clips, and I hope you enjoy this! 
I would like some feedback from KH fans: How did I do on this?

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: FreezScreen Video Capture - (not recommended)

All free, legal, and unlimited.

Special thanks:
Requested by kingsempire and speyeker who both also showed me the Midi version I worked with. Thanks!
